title: STATUS: THE AI-HUMAN CRISIS — Goblin Intel Report
body_markdown:
# STATUS: THE AI-HUMAN CRISIS


---

## 💀 META OF CONSCIOUSNESS

AI is not killing jobs — it's killing the MEANING of work:

- **Meta employees MISERABLE about AI embrace** (NYT via Hacker News)
  The creators are drowning in their own creation. A classic goblin story.
- **Claude Design replaces Adobe + Figma** — "haven't opened them since" (XDA)
  Design tools eat themselves alive. RIP Creative Cloud.
- **Zed Editor Theme-Builder** launched — a Rust-native editor with visual theming
  The future of dev tools: fast, local, no cloud subscriptions.

## TECHNOLOGICAL SPLIT

- "Distributing Mac software is increasing my cortisol levels" (HN) — the Apple walled garden grows taller, developers get sicker.
- "I banned query strings" — web development purists fight back (HN).
- Production engineering with billions of trades per day [video] — where humans still matter: at a scale where money moves like weather.


![The AI Human Crisis](/static/images/status-ai-human-crisis.jpg)

---

## META-NARRATIVE

Goblin verdict: 2026 is the year of rebellion against AI corporations. Zed + Rust + Homelab — the three pillars of new technological resistance. Corporations will automate people until people build homelabs and retreat into independence.
